new_findings.pattern: I was trying to use the app, but it keeps crashing
new_findings.rationale: This specific phrasing about app crashing does not appear in the real batch.

new_findings.rationale: This expression of frustration about lack of support is unique to the synthetic batch.

new_findings.rationale: This specific confusion about subscription status is not found in the real batch.

new_findings.pattern: I am experiencing an issue with the software application that consistently crashes
new_findings.rationale: This formal structure describing a software issue does not appear in the real batch.
